title: Derive tenant context from the authenticated principal
description: Resolve the active tenant from the verified session or token, never from a client-supplied id, header, or body field.
body: Use when establishing which tenant a request acts on. Do not read the tenant from a request parameter a client can set. Actions: extract the tenant claim from the authenticated token or session; reject requests whose claimed tenant does not match the principal; thread that trusted tenant context through the request. Validation signals include a forged tenant id in the body being ignored in favor of the authenticated tenant. Risk boundary: trusting client-supplied tenant identity lets a caller impersonate another tenant, so always bind tenant context to the principal and escalate any code that reads it from input.
